response.justification: Bogdan has strong general software engineering experience and demonstrates expertise in systems programming with languages like D and C++. However, his primary focus has been on web/mobile development and geospatial platforms rather than routing/data pipeline systems. His lack of direct experience with modern C++/Rust in high-performance routing contexts and geospatial data processing at scale raises concerns about his immediate fit for this role.
strengths: Extensive systems programming experience (C++, C, D)
Proven ability to build and maintain geospatial applications (GISCollective)
Strong problem-solving skills with demonstrated expertise in performance optimization
concerns: Limited direct experience with routing/navigation systems or data pipeline optimization
Primary expertise in web/mobile and non-C++ languages (TypeScript, Node.js)
No clear evidence of working with Rust or modern C++ in production routing contexts

key_factors.factor: Systems programming in C++/Rust at scale
